session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/tui/ -x -v` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for the TUI tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run TUI tests with verbose output, stop on first failure

session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 issue found
**File:** tests/tui/app/test_async_operations.py
**Test:** TestCmuxFocusWorkspace::test_focus_selects_matching_workspace (line 1150)
